div1.entryFree: Curiously, carefully, nicely, minutely: the which if I do not carve most c., say my knife's naught, Ado V, 1, 157. the sleeves c. cut, Shr. IV, 3, 144. that he might take a measure of his own judgements, wherein so c. he had set this counterfeit, All's IV, 3, 39. 'twere to consider too c., to consider so, Hml. V, 1, 227.
